info.title: TalentSphere Source-Derived API Contract
info.description: Deterministic OpenAPI contract generated from active Spring controller source. Runtime service discovery and Springdoc output are not verified by this artifact.

x-talentsphere.source: Static scan of services/* Spring controller, entity, DTO, and shared contract Java source.
limitations: Does not execute Spring Boot or fetch /v3/api-docs.
Does not prove runtime serialization, validation groups, service discovery, auth propagation, or database behavior.
Dynamic routes and values built outside controller annotations require manual review.
OpenAPI schemas are derived from Java field declarations and controller signatures, not from runtime Jackson metadata.
